notes: Calls qc_isodtc verbatim in DATEC mode against a 5-row dataset of (year, month abbreviation, day) character pieces. Tests the array-based JAN/FEB/.../DEC -> 01/02/.../12 lookup, numeric-month digit handling, and final ISO 8601 assembly via catx. The macro's other parameter modes (DATETIMEN/DATEN/TIMEN/TIMEC) are out of scope for this bundle.
